title: TC-001: Single Earbud Placed in Unplugged Case — Verify No Duplicate Charging Notification (Asymmetric State)
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ earbuds are connected to phone via Bluetooth. Charge case is NOT plugged into power (running on internal battery). Phone notifications are enabled for Poly Studio Mobile app.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds show as 'Connected' and 'Worn'.
2. Close/minimize the app (press Home button).
3. Remove the RIGHT earbud from your ear and place it into the charging case. Close the case lid partially or ensure the earbud makes contact with charging pins.
4. Observe the phone notification area for 10 seconds.
5. Without removing the LEFT earbud from your ear, open the charging case and remove the RIGHT earbud from the case.
6. Place the RIGHT earbud back into the charging case a second time.
7. Observe the phone notification area for 10 seconds.
expected: A single charging notification appears when the RIGHT earbud first makes contact with the charging pins. No duplicate or second notification appears when the earbud is placed back in the case a second time. The LEFT earbud continues to show as 'Worn' in the app. The notification accurately reflects that only the RIGHT earbud is charging.

title: TC-002: Asymmetric Earbud State — One Worn, One Charging in Unplugged Case — Notification Content Accuracy
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ earbuds connected. Charge case unplugged (internal battery).
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → verify both earbuds show 'Worn' status.
2. Keep the LEFT earbud in your ear (worn state).
3. Remove the RIGHT earbud from your ear and place it into the charging case. Ensure charging contact is made.
4. Observe the notification that appears. Note the exact text of the notification.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify the device status screen shows LEFT: 'Worn' and RIGHT: 'Charging'.
6. Leave the LEFT earbud in your ear. Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case and re-insert it into the case.
7. Observe if any new notification appears.
8. Open the app again and verify the device status screen.
expected: The notification text accurately indicates that only the RIGHT earbud is charging (e.g., 'Right earbud charging' or similar specific text, NOT 'Both earbuds charging'). No duplicate notification appears upon re-insertion. The app device status screen shows asymmetric state: LEFT = 'Worn', RIGHT = 'Charging'.

title: TC-003: App Lifecycle — Background/Foreground During Asymmetric Charging State — Notification Deduplication
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Press Home button to background the app.
3. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case (RIGHT earbud remains in ear). Observe notification.
4. Wait 5 seconds. Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from Recent Apps).
5. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
6. While keeping LEFT earbud in the case, remove and re-insert it into the case.
7. Observe notification area for any new notifications.
8. Open the app and verify device status screen shows LEFT: 'Charging', RIGHT: 'Worn'.
expected: After force-kill and relaunch, the app correctly shows the asymmetric state (LEFT charging, RIGHT worn). Re-inserting the LEFT earbud does NOT trigger a duplicate charging notification. Only a single notification was ever shown (from step 3).

title: TC-004: Bluetooth Disconnect/Reconnect During Asymmetric Charging — Notification Behavior
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Place the RIGHT earbud into the charging case. LEFT earbud remains worn. Observe notification.
3. From the phone's Bluetooth settings, tap 'Forget' or 'Disconnect' from the Voyager Free 60+.
4. Wait 5 seconds. Re-pair/reconnect the earbuds from Bluetooth settings.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
6. Observe the notification area for any charging notifications.
7. Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case and re-insert it.
8. Observe notification area.
expected: After Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect, the app correctly restores the asymmetric state display (LEFT worn, RIGHT charging). No duplicate charging notification appears upon reconnection. Re-inserting the RIGHT earbud does NOT trigger a second notification. The system deduplicates the charging notification based on the unchanged state (RIGHT was already charging before disconnect).

title: TC-005: Switching Which Earbud is Worn vs. Charging — Verify Independent Notification Events
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case. RIGHT earbud remains worn. Observe notification.
3. Wait 5 seconds. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case and put it back in your ear.
4. Observe notification area — note if a 'charging stopped' or 'worn' notification appears.
5. Now place the RIGHT earbud into the charging case. LEFT earbud remains worn.
6. Observe notification area for 10 seconds.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
expected: When LEFT earbud is removed from the case, a notification (or notification update) indicates LEFT is no longer charging. When RIGHT earbud is then placed in the case, a single new notification appears indicating RIGHT is charging — NOT a duplicate of the previous LEFT notification. The app shows LEFT: 'Worn', RIGHT: 'Charging'. No duplicate or stale notifications remain.

title: TC-006: Both Earbuds Worn → One Placed in Case → Second Also Placed in Case — Progressive Notification Accuracy
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case. Observe notification.
3. Wait 5 seconds. While LEFT remains in the case, place the RIGHT earbud into the charging case as well.
4. Observe notification area for 10 seconds after the second earbud is placed.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
6. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case (RIGHT remains in case).
7. Observe notification area.
8. Open the app and verify device status.
expected: Step 2: Single notification 'Left earbud charging' appears. Step 3-4: Notification updates to 'Both earbuds charging' — NO duplicate notification. Only one notification is present, with updated content. Step 6-7: Notification updates to 'Right earbud charging' — again, no duplicate. The app correctly shows progressive state changes: (LEFT charging) → (Both charging) → (RIGHT charging).

title: TC-007: Charge Case Touchscreen Interaction During Asymmetric Charging — Verify No Duplicate Phone Notifications
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged and touchscreen active.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case. Observe phone notification.
3. On the charge case touchscreen, navigate to the earbud status screen and verify it shows LEFT as charging.
4. On the charge case touchscreen, tap to dismiss or navigate away from the charging status screen.
5. Observe the phone notification area for any new or duplicate notifications triggered by the touchscreen interaction.
6. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case and re-insert it.
7. Observe phone notification area.
8. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
expected: Interacting with the charge case touchscreen (viewing/dismissing charging status) does NOT trigger any additional or duplicate phone notifications. The phone notification from step 2 remains the only notification. Re-inserting the LEFT earbud also does not create a duplicate. The app shows LEFT: 'Charging', RIGHT: 'Worn'.

title: TC-008: Rapid Toggle — Earbud In/Out of Case Multiple Times — Verify Notification Throttling/Deduplication
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Rapidly (within 3 seconds) perform the following sequence with the RIGHT earbud: Remove from ear → Place in case → Remove from case → Place in ear → Remove from ear → Place in case.
3. Observe the notification area for 15 seconds after the sequence ends.
4. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
5. Wait 10 seconds. Observe if any additional notifications appear.
6. Open the app again and verify device status remains consistent.
expected: At most one charging notification appears for the RIGHT earbud during the rapid toggle sequence. The system throttles or deduplicates notifications during rapid state changes. The final device status shows RIGHT: 'Charging' (since the last action was placing it in the case). No delayed or duplicate notifications appear after the 15-second observation window.

title: TC-009: Phone Reboot During Asymmetric Charging — Notification Restoration and Deduplication
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ connected. Charge case unplugged.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds 'Worn'.
2. Place the RIGHT earbud into the charging case. LEFT earbud remains worn. Observe notification.
3. Reboot the phone.
4. After phone restarts, ensure Bluetooth is enabled. Wait for automatic reconnection to Voyager Free 60+.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
6. Observe the notification area for 15 seconds.
7. Remove the RIGHT earbud from the case and re-insert it.
8. Observe notification area for 10 seconds.
expected: After phone reboot and reconnection, the app correctly shows LEFT: 'Worn', RIGHT: 'Charging'. A single charging notification may reappear (restored from the persistent state), but NO duplicate notification appears. Re-inserting the RIGHT earbud does NOT trigger a second notification. The system deduplicates based on the unchanged charging state.

title: TC-010: Verify No Charging Notification When Earbud is Placed in Case but Case Battery is Depleted
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ charge case battery is fully depleted (0%). Earbuds are connected to phone via Bluetooth. Case is NOT plugged into power.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify both earbuds show as 'Connected' and 'Worn'.
2. Verify the charge case battery status shows 0% or 'Case battery low' in the app.
3. Place the LEFT earbud into the charging case. Ensure charging pins make contact.
4. Observe the phone notification area for 15 seconds.
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → verify device status.
6. Remove the LEFT earbud from the case and place the RIGHT earbud into the case.
7. Observe the phone notification area for 15 seconds.
8. Open the app and verify device status.
expected: No charging notification appears when an earbud is placed in the case with a depleted case battery, because the earbud cannot actually charge. The app device status shows the earbud as 'In case' or 'Not charging' (not 'Charging'). No duplicate or false 'charging' notifications are generated. This validates that the notification trigger is based on actual charging current detection, not just physical contact with the case.
